name: Bryan School Bus Line Inc
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found under 'Bryan School Bus Line', 'Bryans School Bus', or 'Bryan School Bus'. Bizapedia confirms a Pennsylvania-listed entity named 'Bryan School Bus Line, Inc.' (location described as Butler, PA - consistent with Prospect, PA in Butler County) but the Bizapedia detail page returned only a security challenge and no entity ID/filing date were retrievable. No PA Department of State entity record was retrievable via open web; PA SOS direct search blocked (403). Likely small private operator; no carrier address/USDOT confirmed. Address per source: Road 1, Prospect, PA 16052.

name: School Transit Inc
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found under 'School Transit' or 'School Transit Inc' (begins/anywhere searches). The Johnstown, PA 15905 area is served primarily by McIlwain School Bus Lines Inc (USDOT 1247930) and Ribblett School Bus Line - neither matches the legal name 'School Transit Inc'. Bizapedia URL returned HTTP 410 Gone (entity may have been dissolved or removed). PA SOS direct search blocked (403). No state corporate registry record retrievable via open web; entity likely inactive/dissolved given Bizapedia removal. Address per source: 721 Westinghouse Ave, Johnstown, PA 15905.

name: Boulden Buses Inc
carrier_operation: Interstate; Private Passenger (Business and Non-Business); Authorized For Hire (Property authority via MC-95327)
officers: Michelle Dougherty (Business Administrator); Christopher Darsney (officer per third-party aggregator)
registry_source: Delaware Division of Corporations (icis.corp.delaware.gov) — confirmed via BBB profile and Delaware Open Checkbook payments
notes: FMCSA SAFER direct match on USDOT 6727; address ties exactly to input '32 Honeysuckle Ln, Stanton, DE 19804' (Stanton is the postal Wilmington 19804 area). BBB profile lists 'Business Started' and 'Business Incorporated' as 01/01/1942 (may be approximated/registered to start of year). Delaware corp lookup interface blocked; status as 'active' inferred from active USDOT operations, BBB profile, and ongoing Delaware Open Checkbook vendor payments. Note one search source mentioned 1933 vs BBB's 1942 - using BBB which directly states 'Business Incorporated 1/1/1942'.

name: Turkeyfoot Transport Inc
carrier_operation: DOT-registered motor carrier; transports passengers (no hazmat) per QuickTransportSolutions; SAFER record currently shows status INACTIVE
fmcsa_address: 921 Casselman St, Confluence, PA 15424 (mailing: 902 Casselman St, Confluence, PA 15424)
fmcsa_status: INACTIVE (per current SAFER lookup on USDOT 1005395)
registry_source: PA Department of State (not retrievable via open web; PA SOS direct search returned 403)
notes: Strong match on legal name 'Turkeyfoot Transportation, Inc.' (input variant 'Turkeyfoot Transport Inc') in Confluence, PA. USDOT 1005395. Operating addresses 921/902 Casselman St correspond to input '820 Casselman St' (same small Confluence corridor; likely garage vs office vs prior address). QuickTransportSolutions notes insurance policies dating to 2002 - suggesting operation since at least 2002. SAFER currently shows the USDOT record as INACTIVE; QuickTransportSolutions describes it as 'active DOT registered motor carrier' (data lag possible). Reported only 1 power unit / 1 driver - inconsistent with a multi-bus school transportation operator; possible this is a separate trucking entity coincidentally sharing the Turkeyfoot name, OR the school bus operation runs under a separate USDOT not located. Confidence on USDOT match: medium-high; confidence on this being the target school-bus operator: medium.

name: Bay Terrace Transit Corp
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found for 'Bay Terrace Transit Corp', 'Bay Terrace Transit', or 'Bay Terrace' (multiple search variants tried). Bizapedia has a listing for 'Bay Terrace Transit Corp' located in Flushing, NY - consistent with the input address (7918 269th St, New Hyde Park, NY 11040 sits on the NYC/Queens-Nassau border near Floral Park/Bayside area), but the Bizapedia detail page returned only a security check with no DOS ID, filing date, or officer data. NY DOS public inquiry direct API failed (socket closed). OpenGovNY/OpenGovUS searches returned multiple other 'Bay Terrace' entities (cooperatives, management LLC, cafe) but no Bay Terrace Transit Corp. Not listed on NYC OPT vendor lists found. Entity may exist in NY DOS records under a slightly different name (e.g., 'Bay Terrace Bus Co') or may be a small/historical operator. Operating status unknown - likely small/inactive based on web invisibility.
